prompt: Run: node skills/crm/scripts/sync.js --days 0.5 --participant "Vlad Atanov" --recap. If the output is NO_NEW_MEETINGS, respond with exactly <skip>. Otherwise, the output may contain multiple meetings separated by ===MEETING_SEPARATOR===. Send each meeting as a SEPARATE message (one message per meeting). Forward each meeting's text exactly as-is — it's already formatted. After each meeting, add: "👆 Review action items — approve or reject before I post to Slack."
